analysis_summary: Reload/Ammo EventHandler Analysis via Ghidra MCP

Menace.Tactical.AI.Behaviors.Reload.description: AI behavior for evaluating and executing weapon reload actions

0x60.name: EvaluationDelegate
0x60.description: Callback delegate - either ConsiderHeatCapacity or ConsiderReloadingSwitch

OnEvaluate.description: Evaluates reload utility. Requires AP >= 2, checks skill affordability/usability. Calculates damage potential via DamageOverTimeHandler iteration.

OnExecute.description: Executes reload via Skill.Use with flags 0x10

ConsiderHeatCapacity.description: Heat-based weapon evaluation. Scales utility by heat percentage and remaining uses.

ConsiderReloadingSwitch.description: Simple multiplier (0.5) for weapons with ammo type switching

Menace.Tactical.Actor.RefillAmmo.description: Core ammo refill method on Actor

param_2.name: refillPercent
param_2.description: Percentage of max ammo to refill (0.0-1.0)

param_3.name: minAmount
param_3.description: Minimum ammo to add regardless of percentage

param_4.name: skillFilter
param_4.description: Optional filter to select which skills receive ammo

Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.RefillAmm.description: Effect handler for refilling actor ammo

0x58.name: RefillPercent
0x58.description: Percentage of max ammo to restore

OnApply.description: Applies refill effect to target tile's actor

IsApplicableTo.description: Returns true if any actor skill has CurrentAmmo < MaxAmmo

Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.AmmoPouch.description: Passive effect that increases max ammo capacity

0x60.name: AmmoType
0x60.description: Ammo type filter (matches Item template offset 0xec)

OnAnySkillAdded.description: Increases MaxAmmo and CurrentAmmo when matching skill is added

OnMissionStarted.description: Applies ammo bonus to all active skills at mission start

0xc0.name: RefillPercent
0xc0.description: Percentage of max ammo to restore

TryPickup.description: Handles ammo pickup, plays sound, shows UI text, removes tile effect

CanPickup.description: Checks team match, skill container presence, and pickup flag

Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.HeatCapac.description: Heat-based weapon capacity system (alternative to ammo)

0x10.name: OwnerSkill
0x10.description: Skill this handler is attached to

OnRoundStart.description: Applies cooldown, shows overheat warning if still hot

OnUse_AddHeat.description: Adds HeatPerUse to CurrentHeat, syncs animator, warns if overheating

Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.VentHeatH.description: Active ability to vent/clear heat from weapon

0x10.name: OwnerSkill
0x10.description: Skill this handler is attached to

0x58.name: LinkedSkillTemplate
0x58.description: Reference to the heat-generating weapon skill

OnUse.description: Vents heat, spawns visual effects, clears heat value

Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.SwitchBet.description: Handler for weapons with multiple ammo types

GetAlternateSkill.description: Retrieves alternate skill from SkillContainer using LinkedSkillTemplate

OnUse.description: Switches active weapon to alternate skill

Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.ReportAmm.description: Syncs ammo count to character animator

UpdateAmmo.description: Sets animator int parameter to current ammo count (Skill+0xa8)

Menace.Tactical.AI.Behaviors.SupplyAmmo.description: AI behavior for seeking ammo supplies

0x10.name: SkillTypeFlags
0x10.description: Bitflags for skill types needing ammo

0x14.name: HasSkillNeedingAmmo
0x14.description: True if any skill needs ammo

GetTargetValue.description: Calculates utility based on HP, ammo needs, and enemy threats

Menace.Tactical.Skills.Effects.DamageOve.description: Handler for damage-over-time effects (used in reload evaluation)

0x5c.name: HitMultiplier
0x5c.description: Multiplier for hit count based on element count

0x64.name: HPMultiplier
0x64.description: Target HP percentage for damage calculation

0x6c.name: ArmorMultiplier
0x6c.description: Target armor percentage for damage calculation

0x74.name: SkipIfShielded
0x74.description: Skip damage if target has shield

0x84.name: ArmorPenetration
0x84.description: Armor value to ignore for damage calculation

OnCalculateExpectedDamage.description: Calculates expected damage for AI/UI preview with armor mitigation

constants.DAT_182d8fd3c: HP threshold for ammo supply evaluation

skill_template_offsets.0x154: MuzzleCount (int) - Number of muzzle effects to spawn

related_systems.SkillContainer: Holds all skills for an actor, accessible via virtual method at Actor+0x3f0
related_systems.ElementAnimator: Character animator that receives ammo state updates
related_systems.UnitHUD: UI component for displaying ammo/overheat notifications
related_systems.AIConfig: Singleton with utility thresholds and multipliers for AI decisions
